Skip to contents
RMINC 2.0.0.0
  • Reference

AGENTS.md — RMINC

Source: AGENTS.md

What This Is

R package for statistical analysis of MINC neuroimaging files. Compiled C/C++ backend via Rcpp + autoconf.

Build & Install

The package requires external MINC libraries (minc-toolkit-v2 or libminc built from source) and HDF5. configure.ac locates them and generates src/Makevars from src/Makevars.in.

R CMD build .                          # creates RMINC_*.tar.gz
R CMD INSTALL RMINC_*.tar.gz           # install locally

If configure can’t find MINC, set MINC_TOOLKIT or --with-build-path= to the install prefix.

Testing

Rscript -e "library(RMINC); devtools::test('.')"                          # all tests
Rscript -e "library(RMINC); devtools::test('.', filter = 'mincLm')"       # filtered

Tests depend on fixture data in tests/testthat/rminctestdata/ and tests/testthat/RMINC-test-data-main/.

Docker-Based Testing

docker build -t rminc-test .
docker run -v $(pwd):/RMINC rminc-test              # check + tests
docker run -v $(pwd):/RMINC rminc-test test          # tests only
docker run -v $(pwd):/RMINC rminc-test test mincLm   # filtered tests

R CMD Check

R CMD check --as-cran --no-install RMINC_*.tar.gz

Documentation

NAMESPACE and man/ are generated by roxygen2 (v7.3.3). After editing R source with roxygen comments:

Rscript -e "roxygen2::roxygenise()"

Architecture

  • R/ — Pure R code. Key files: minc_voxel_statistics.R, minc_lmer.R, minc_interface.R, minc_FDR.R, minc_hierarchical_anatomy.R, minc_vertex_statistics.R
  • src/ — C/C++ sources. Rcpp bindings in RcppExports.cpp (auto-generated), core I/O in minc_reader.c/minc2_read.c, modelling in modelling_functions.c, vertex TFCE in vertex_tfce.cpp
  • tests/testthat/ — testthat tests (28 test files)
  • inst/ — installed extras including documentation and autoconf m4 macros

Conventions

  • Default branch is develop (CI triggers on push/PR to develop)
  • R code uses 2-space indentation (see .Rproj)
  • No Windows support (OS_type: unix)
  • Requires R >= 4.0
  • CI matrix: ubuntu-latest + macos-latest, R versions: devel, release, oldrel-1, oldrel-2
  • src/Makevars is generated — do not edit directly; edit src/Makevars.in instead
  • RcppExports.R and RcppExports.cpp are auto-generated by Rcpp — do not edit

On this page

Developed by Jason Lerch, Chris Hammill, Matthijs van Eede, Daniel Cassel.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
